services.short: Process, boiler, cooling and discharge water systems.
services.blurb: Design, delivery and optimisation of treatment systems for process water, boilers, cooling towers and discharge streams — engineered around your operation, not a product line.
services.h1: Industrial water treatment engineered for uptime
services.tagline: From raw water intake to final discharge, we design and optimise treatment that protects your assets, your product quality and your licence to operate.
services.overview: Poorly matched treatment is the most common — and most expensive — problem we find on industrial sites. We start with a full characterisation of your water and your process, then design the simplest reliable treatment train that meets spec: filtration, softening, membrane systems, chemical dosing or a combination. Because we don't sell equipment, the design is judged purely on lifetime cost and performance.

outcomes.d: Treatment sized to your real demand — no overbuilt capital you'll never use.
Scaling, corrosion and fouling controlled before they shorten plant life.
Dosing optimised against measured water chemistry, not supplier defaults.
Outputs that reliably meet trade waste and EPA licence conditions.

steps.d: Sample and analyse every water stream entering and leaving the process.
Model options and recommend the lowest whole-of-life-cost treatment train.
Manage procurement, installation and commissioning with vendors of your choice.
Tune performance against live data through the first months of operation.

services.short: Safe, compliant potable water for communities and sites.
services.blurb: Potable water risk management, disinfection and ADWG compliance for towns, remote sites and facilities — so the water people drink is never in question.
services.h1: Drinking water quality you can stand behind
services.tagline: Risk-based management of potable supplies — from source to tap — aligned with the Australian Drinking Water Guidelines.
services.overview: Whether you supply a workforce camp, a caravan park or a regional community, the obligations are the same: safe water, every day, provably. We build and maintain drinking water risk management plans, design disinfection and treatment barriers, run verification monitoring programs and prepare you for regulator audits — turning compliance from a worry into a routine.

outcomes.d: Documented, auditable risk management from catchment to consumer.
Treatment and disinfection designed for your actual source risks.
Sampling programs that prove performance, not just tick boxes.
Records and reporting regulators accept the first time.

steps.d: Source-to-tap risk assessment of your supply and existing barriers.
Drinking water risk management plan with clear critical limits.
Treatment upgrades, monitoring hardware and operator training.
Ongoing sampling, review and continuous improvement cycles.

services.short: Trade waste, effluent treatment and discharge compliance.
services.blurb: Practical wastewater and trade waste solutions that keep you inside your discharge limits — and turn disposal costs into recovery opportunities where the numbers stack up.
services.h1: Wastewater solutions that end discharge anxiety
services.tagline: Effluent treatment, trade waste management and discharge licensing support for industrial and municipal operators.
services.overview: Wastewater is where compliance risk and operating cost collide. We audit your effluent streams, identify what can be reduced at source, design or upgrade treatment to meet discharge limits with margin, and manage trade waste agreements with utilities. Where volumes justify it, we assess recovery options — reuse, nutrient capture or energy — so waste becomes a smaller line item.

outcomes.d: Treatment designed to meet licence limits with operating headroom.
Load reduced at source before it reaches the meter.
Treatment that keeps neighbours and regulators off the phone.
Reuse and resource recovery assessed on real payback, not fashion.

steps.d: Characterise effluent streams, loads and existing treatment performance.
Cut load at source through process and housekeeping changes.
Design or upgrade treatment to meet limits reliably.
Ongoing monitoring, reporting and utility liaison.

services.short: Cut mains demand and discharge with fit-for-purpose reuse.
services.blurb: Capture, treat and reuse water across your site — cutting mains demand, discharge volumes and cost while strengthening your sustainability position.
services.h1: Water recycling that pays its own way
services.tagline: Fit-for-purpose reuse schemes that match treated water quality to each application — no more, no less.
services.overview: Most sites pay twice for water: once to buy it, once to dispose of it. Recycling breaks that cycle. We identify reuse opportunities across your site — wash-down, irrigation, cooling make-up, dust suppression, process feed — and design treatment that lifts each stream to exactly the quality its new duty requires. The result is a scheme with genuine payback, not a green gesture.

outcomes.d: Purchased water displaced by treated on-site streams.
Every kilolitre reused is one you don't pay to dispose of.
Each reuse duty gets the treatment it needs — nothing gold-plated.
Reported recycling figures backed by metered, auditable data.

steps.d: Site-wide water balance mapping every source, use and discharge.
Pair candidate streams with duties they can serve after treatment.
Deliver treatment, storage and reticulation for the selected scheme.
Measure savings and report them credibly.

services.short: Bore performance, aquifer sampling and licensing support.
services.blurb: Groundwater monitoring, bore performance assessment and licensing support that protect both your water security and your compliance standing.
services.tagline: Reliable data on bore performance and aquifer health — collected, interpreted and reported by specialists.
services.overview: Groundwater problems announce themselves slowly, then all at once: falling yields, rising salinity, a licence review you weren't ready for. We run structured monitoring programs — levels, quality, abstraction — assess bore condition and efficiency, and prepare the technical reporting your licences require. When bores underperform, we diagnose whether the answer is rehabilitation, redevelopment or replacement before you spend.

featurePanel.heading: Borehole programs with defensible field data.
featurePanel.imgAlt: A field technician surveying a groundwater monitoring bore
points: Standing water levels and bore condition checks
pH, EC, ORP, DO, temperature and turbidity
Sample preservation, transport and lab liaison

outcomes.d: Sampling and measurement to standards regulators accept.
Trends in yield and quality flagged before they become failures.
Technical reporting for renewals, reviews and new allocations.
Rehabilitate, redevelop or replace — decided on evidence.

steps.d: Establish current bore condition, yield and water quality.
Scheduled level, quality and abstraction monitoring rounds.
Trend analysis and clear reporting — not just data dumps.
Targeted interventions when the data says so.

services.short: Accredited sampling programs, audits and reporting.
services.blurb: Structured sampling programs, NATA-accredited laboratory analysis and compliance reporting — the evidence base for every water decision you make.
services.h1: Testing and compliance without the scramble
services.tagline: Sampling programs and reporting that keep you continuously audit-ready across every obligation.
services.overview: Most compliance failures aren't caused by bad water — they're caused by gaps: a missed sample, an unactioned exceedance, a report filed late. We design monitoring programs around your actual obligations, take samples to chain-of-custody standards, work with NATA-accredited laboratories, and turn results into plain-English reporting with clear actions. Exceedances get escalated the day they're known, not at month end.

outcomes.d: Every licence condition mapped to a scheduled sample or check.
NATA-accredited laboratory partners for defensible results.
Results interpreted with actions — not spreadsheets to decode.
Exceedances flagged and managed within 24 hours.

steps.d: Register every compliance obligation across your permits.
Build the sampling and inspection calendar.
Field collection to chain-of-custody standards.
Interpreted results, trends and regulator-ready records.

services.short: Audits that cut chemical, energy and water costs.
services.blurb: Independent audits of treatment performance, chemical dosing, energy use and membrane health — finding the savings your incumbent supplier has no incentive to show you.
services.tagline: Independent performance audits that routinely cut water treatment operating costs by 20–40%.
services.overview: Treatment systems drift: setpoints creep, dosing rises 'to be safe', membranes are replaced on schedule rather than condition. Because we're independent, we can ask the questions a chemical or equipment supplier can't. Our audits benchmark your plant against its design intent and best practice, then deliver a ranked list of actions — most requiring no capital at all.

outcomes.d: Every opportunity costed and ordered by payback.
Dosing matched to measured demand, not habit.
Pumping and treatment energy benchmarked and trimmed.
Membranes and media run on condition, not calendar.

steps.d: Compare current performance to design and best practice.
Trace each gap to its root cause on site.
Rank actions by savings, cost and risk.
Implement, verify savings and lock in new setpoints.

services.short: Water balance studies, efficiency roadmaps and ESG reporting.
services.blurb: Site-wide water strategy — balance studies, efficiency roadmaps and credible ESG reporting that stands up to investor and regulator scrutiny.
services.h1: Water strategy for the decade ahead
services.tagline: Long-term water security, efficiency and reporting — planned as one program instead of scattered projects.
services.overview: Water is becoming a board-level risk: scarcer allocations, tighter discharge rules, ESG disclosure that must survive audit. We help you get ahead of it with a site or portfolio water strategy — a measured baseline, a costed efficiency roadmap, and reporting frameworks aligned to the standards your stakeholders use. Every claim in the report traces back to a meter.

outcomes.d: A defensible water balance for every site in scope.
Efficiency and resilience projects sequenced by return.
Disclosure-ready water metrics with a clear audit trail.
Supply risks identified and mitigated before they bite.

steps.d: Meter, measure and reconcile all water flows.
Set targets aligned to business and regulatory horizons.
Sequence projects with costs, savings and owners.
Track progress in disclosure-ready formats.

industries.intro: From dewatering and process water to camp potable supplies and closure obligations, mining runs on water. We help operators secure supply, meet environmental conditions and cut the real cost per kilolitre — with advice that's independent of any equipment or chemical vendor.

challenges.d: Managing volumes, quality and discharge conditions when the pit produces more water than the plant needs.
Recovery circuits are sensitive to salinity and chemistry drift — we keep process water inside the window.
ADWG-compliant potable water for remote workforces, monitored and documented.

industries.statD: Water recycled annually across mining client sites — displacing raw abstraction and cutting discharge volumes. (Representative figure for design review.)

industries.intro: Yield starts with water quality. We help growers and producers protect bore assets, match irrigation water quality to crops and soils, and keep livestock supplies safe — turning water from a background worry into a managed asset.

challenges.d: Falling yields and creeping salinity diagnosed early, before they threaten a season.
Chemistry matched to crop and soil tolerance to protect long-term productivity.
Supplies tested and treated so stock health is never the variable.

industries.statD: Agricultural enterprises supported with bore monitoring and irrigation water programs. (Representative figure for design review.)

industries.h1: Water solutions for commercial & industrial sites
industries.intro: Manufacturers, processors and large facilities carry water costs on three fronts: supply, treatment and trade waste. We attack all three — optimising cooling and boiler systems, right-sizing treatment and cutting discharge loads at source.

challenges.d: Scale, corrosion and blowdown losses controlled with chemistry, not guesswork.
Loads reduced at source so fees fall and agreements stay comfortable.
Consistent quality feed water that protects product and plant alike.

industries.statD: Average reduction in water operating costs achieved through independent optimisation audits. (Representative figure for design review.)

industries.intro: Councils and agencies answer to the highest standard of all: public trust. We support drinking water risk management, wastewater compliance, infrastructure planning and the technical reporting that keeps community supplies safe and defensible.

challenges.d: ADWG-aligned risk plans, verification monitoring and audit-ready records.
Independent condition and options assessments before capital is committed.
Discharge, recycled water and catchment obligations managed as one program.

industries.statD: Microbiological compliance maintained across managed community drinking water programs. (Representative figure for design review.)

industries.intro: Hotels, venues and facility portfolios carry quiet but serious water risks — Legionella in warm water systems, pool and spa compliance, cooling tower registration. We run the programs that keep guests safe and liability off your desk.

challenges.d: Warm water system risk plans, monitoring and remediation to AS/NZS standards.
Water quality management that keeps health inspectors satisfied and guests happy.
Registration, risk management plans and audits handled end to end.

industries.statD: Maximum response time for urgent water quality events across managed hospitality portfolios. (Representative figure for design review.)

projects.t: Process water recycling scheme, WA goldfields
projects.d: A site-wide water balance uncovered 40% of process demand that could be met from treated dewatering flows. We designed and delivered the recycling train and reticulation.
Rebuilt a shire's drinking water risk management plan, upgraded disinfection barriers and established verification monitoring across four towns.
Source-level load reduction and a targeted treatment upgrade brought a growing food plant back inside its trade waste agreement — without production constraints.
Portfolio-wide warm water risk assessment, remediation of legacy dead legs and an ongoing monitoring program across nine properties.
Diagnosed declining yields as iron bacteria fouling rather than aquifer stress; staged rehabilitation restored capacity ahead of the irrigation season.
An independent audit found over-dosing and excessive blowdown across three cooling circuits. New setpoints and controls cut water and chemical spend sharply.

why.d: We sell no chemicals and no equipment — recommendations are judged only on your outcomes.
One senior team from diagnosis through design, delivery and ongoing management.
Every program is built backwards from your licence conditions and obligations.
Efficiency and reuse designed to cut costs, not just decorate reports.

process.d: We sample, measure and audit before we recommend anything — the water sets the agenda.
Options are modelled and costed; you choose with full visibility of trade-offs.
We deliver with vendors of your choice — or manage the whole program for you.
Live monitoring and periodic reviews keep performance improving year on year.

values.d: No equipment lines, no chemical margins. Advice with nothing behind it but evidence.
Decisions built on sampling, data and standards — never on assumption or habit.
Water is a shared resource. We design as if the catchment were a client too.
Plain-English reporting, honest trade-offs, and bad news delivered early.

team.bio: Placeholder profile — monitoring, groundwater and reporting lead. Final bios to be supplied by Forbes Water.

engagement.d: One-off assessments, audits and expert reviews with a clear report and ranked actions — ideal for a second opinion or a stubborn problem.
Fixed-scope design and delivery of treatment, recycling or monitoring upgrades, managed end to end with vendors of your choice.
We run your water program — monitoring, compliance, optimisation and reporting — as an extension of your team.

pillars.d: Efficiency first: fixing losses, right-sizing use and eliminating waste before any new supply is considered.
Fit-for-purpose reuse that displaces purchased water and shrinks discharge — with metered, provable savings.
Discharge quality, catchment health and aquifer sustainability engineered in from the first design sketch.
Credible, auditable water data — because stewardship claims are only as good as the meters behind them.

impact.d: Water recycled annually across client sites
Average discharge volume reduction on reuse projects
Sites operating under managed water programs

practice.d: Every supply study we run starts with what the site already has — most 'shortage' problems are efficiency problems in disguise.
We design discharge quality to the receiving environment's needs, not just the licence minimum.
We'll only report a water metric we can trace to a meter — and we've talked clients out of claims that wouldn't survive audit.
